parameters.$filter: (SettingName eq 'KillSwitch' or SettingName eq 'IsRunning') and SettingValue eq 'true'

item.Title: HeartbeatSkipped
item.Summary: "Skipped due to active lock or kill switch"

thoughts.description: The agent's reasoning during the heartbeat.

mcpActionsTaken.description: List of MCP Graph queries executed (e.g., 'Checked Calendar', 'Sent Teams Message').

memoryUpdateSummary.description: A concise summary to be logged in the SharePoint Memory List.

parameters.$filter: ScopeKey eq '@{items('Apply_to_each:_Save_Memories')?['scopeKey']}' and (Status eq 'Active' or Status eq 'Tentative')

parameters.name: memory-journal.md
parameters.body:
@{if(contains(string(body('Get_file_content:_Journal_for_Append')), concat('## ', formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'))), replace(string(body('Get_file_content:_Journal_for_Append')), concat('## ', formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'yyyy-MM-dd')), concat('## ', formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), '
', outputs('Compose:_Journal_Entry'))), replace(string(body('Get_file_content:_Journal_for_Append')), '# PowerClaw Memory Journal', concat('# PowerClaw Memory Journal

## ', formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), '
', outputs('Compose:_Journal_Entry'))))}

item.Title: Error
item.Summary: Agent call failed or returned output that could not be parsed as JSON. See FullContextJSON for raw output.
